---
title: Sample Slides 2
subtitle: Using Original Quarto CSS with Preferred Settings
author: Sebastian Freille
institute: Universidad Nacional de Córdoba
format:
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true
    slide-number: true
    preview-links: auto
    css: quarto1.css
    width: 1500
    center-title-slide: true
    center: true
    tbl-cap-location: bottom
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Outline
    link-external-newwindow: true
lang: es
---

# Introduction {background="#43464B"}

## What is this?

- This is a **sample slide** using the original Quarto CSS
- It uses `quarto.css` and `quarto2.css` for styling
- Helvetica/Arial font family

## Features

1. Clean, simple styling
2. Black text on white background
3. Large 40px base font size
4. Compact line spacing

# Content Examples {background="#43464B"}

## Text and Lists

Here's some sample content:

- First bullet point
  - Nested item
  - Another nested item
- Second bullet point
- Third bullet point

## Blockquotes

> "The only way to do great work is to love what you do."
**[Steve Jobs]**

## Math and Code

The quadratic formula: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$

```python
def hello_world():
    print("Hello, World!")
```

# Conclusion {background="#43464B"}

## Summary

- This theme uses your original CSS styling
- Helvetica/Arial fonts throughout
- Clean, minimal design
- Good for general presentations
